ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知一个不在场的邪恶角色（与之前不同），直到所有不在场的邪恶角色你都得知过一次。
firstNightReminder:
Show the character token of a not-in-play evil character.

Mark the Vision with the reminder for that character.
otherNightReminder: Show the character token of a not-in-play evil character whose reminder hasn't been placed on the Vision yet, if there are any. Mark the Vision with the reminder for that character.
flavor: Our very strength invites challenge. Challenge incites conflict. And conflict… breeds catastrophe.
